title: neochilenia odieri
intro: Neochilenia odieri, also known as the Chilean yerba, is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in Chile, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Neochilenia odieri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Neochilenia odieri is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
